research_goal: Understand where and why users abandon checkout — with a focus on the payment step and account creation friction on mobile

screening_criteria.persona: Regular online shoppers who primarily shop on mobile

notes: Priority study for Q1. Prototype ready in Figma — coordinate with design team before sessions.

research_goal: Understand how users search for and discover products — identify where the current search and browse experience creates dead ends or missed finds

screening_criteria.persona: Shoppers who use search or browse categories regularly, not just direct links

notes: Include at least one participant who uses filters heavily and one who relies on search terms.

research_goal: Map the end-to-end returns journey from the user's perspective — identify points of confusion, anxiety, and unmet expectations between initiating a return and receiving a refund

screening_criteria.persona: Shoppers who have made at least one return in the past 3 months

notes: Kicking off in April. Jasmine (P005) has strong opinions on returns — good to start with her.
